top.ko-text:
With Classic Options profitability is limitless! Take a look at the Top-3 deals our traders made using Classic Options.

As you can see, a single option can generate as much as +8300% of profit.

card-1.name: Apple stock downgraded by Pacific Crest analysts
card-1.text:
This Sunday, technology-focused market research firm Pacific Crest has downgraded the status of Apple shares to “overweight” and advised their clients to invest in Alphabet instead.

According to Pacific Crest’s own Andy Hargreaves, those buying the record-breaking stock are not considering all possible risks, such as gross margins, elasticity, supply issues, or the likelihood for sales declines beyond the iPhone 8.

It’s worth mentioning that out of 30 market analysts covering the stock, only five (including Hargreaves) give it a “Hold” rating and none are advising to sell.

card-2.name: General Motors chief to face hedge-fund investor’s push to split up stock
card-2.text:
This Tuesday GM shareholders will cast their votes on Greenlight Capital's plan to split up General Motors stock and to challenge the company's board of directors.

The proposal is to divide GM shares into two classes, which - according to the proponents at Greenlight Capital - could boost the automaker's $52 billion market capitalization by as much as $38 billion. Since the hedge-fund shareholders blame the stock’s poor performance on weak leadership, they’ve also put forth an initiative to replace three GM board directors: Jane Mendillo, Michael Mullen and Carol Stephenson.

Most market experts don’t believe Greenlight’s stock plan will come to fruition at this point, while a board overhaul is very likely to get the votes as its composition has been an issue for investors for decades.

card-3.name: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals’ new skin cancer drug shows treatment effect
card-3.text:
Data from a Phase 1 clinical trial of of Regeneron Pharmaceuticals’ new drug has shown treatment benefit in patients with advanced cutaneous squamous cell carcinoma (a form of skin cancer).

Patients treated with the study drug showed an overall response rate of 46.2%, which is considered outstanding.The most common side effect of the medication is fatigue (23.1%).

A Phase 2 study is currently recruiting patients. If the second leg of it is a success as well, the drug will most likely get on the fast track to getting an FDA approval.

maybe.text-o: Our trader Derek L. invested in a ‘Put’ Classic Option on Goldman Sachs  on Monday and by Tuesday night that position has generated 481.4% of profit.
maybe.text2: The secret to such high profitability? A correct prediction ahead of an earnings report release. You can easily identify companies with pending earnings reports on our platform by spotting a sign next to their names.
